title: scutellaria alpina
intro: Scutellaria alpina, also known as Alpenrose, is a perennial plant species belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Scutellaria alpina include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Scutellaria alpina can be consumed as teas, tinctures, or capsules, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
